title: ChatGPT and Anthropic could soon route extremist AI users to a new third-party tool: Report
summary: A new tool being developed in New Zealand aims to direct individuals exhibiting violent extremist tendencies on ChatGPT to deradicalization support. The tool is being created by a company called ThroughLine.

title: Meta warns iPhone users of Italian spyware campaign disguised as WhatsApp: Here's what you need to know
summary: WhatsApp has alerted around 200 users in Italy about a malicious version of the app containing spyware developed by SIO. Victims were tricked into downloading the fake app through social engineering techniques.

title: Crisis contractor for OpenAI, Anthropic eyes a move to combat extremism

title: Powerus backed by Trump sons looks to sell drone interceptors to Gulf states being attacked by Iran
summary: Powerus cofounder Brett Velicovich told The Associated Press that the company is making sales pitches that include drone demonstrations in several Gulf countries to show how its defensive drone interceptors could help them ward off Iranian attacks.

title: Broadcom taps Alphabet executive Amie Thuener as next CFO
summary: US ​chip designer Broadcom on ​Thursday named Alphabet executive Amie Thuener ​as its next finance chief, effective June 12, when incumbent Kirsten Spears retires. Thuener is currently Alphabet's vice president, corporate controller and ‌chief ⁠accounting officer.
